arts.ttl: ‘Amine Gouiri can be a top European player’ – Roberto De Zerbi
arts.sum: Speaking in his post-match press conference, Olympique de Marseille manager Roberto De Zerbi says he is pleased with Saturday afternoon’s double goalscorer against Saint-Étienne, Amine Gouiri (24), but that the Algerian…

arts.ttl: Samuel Umtiti considered retirement but nearing long-awaited Lille return
arts.sum: Samuel Umtiti (31) has not played a professional match of football since January 2024. During his time away from the pitch, the 2018 World Cup winner considered retirement, according to L’Équipe, however,…
